title: Cozy Sour Creamy American Beef Flank Stir-fry
description: A low-carb-friendly and cozy dish featuring tender beef flank steak cooked in a creamy sauce with sour cream for added depth of flavor.
instructions: Season the beef with salt, pepper, and garlic powder. Grill or pan-sear the steak on high heat for about 5 minutes per side until medium-rare (internal temperature should be around 135°F).
In a small saucepan, combine heavy cream, cumin powder, olive oil, green onions, fresh chives, and pepper. Stir well to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and let the sauce simmer for about 10 minutes until slightly thickened.
Slice the steak against the grain into thin strips and place in a serving dish.
Pour the creamy sauce over the beef slices and mix well.
Serve hot as a side or main dish.
